raw.subject: Your Dayton page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

I noticed your 'Welcome to our Furry Family!' post, with the great photo of your furry friends playing together. It feels like you're building a community around pet care in the Englewood and Vandalia areas.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might be making it harder for new pet owners in the area to find and contact you.

I've taken a close look at your Facebook posts and photos, and I've sketched out a simple page idea that highlights your services overview, photo gallery, contact section, and map with hours. Here's what it looks like:
https://damianbasilio.github.io/f/preview/ark-angels-llc-dayton/

This is just a starting point, and I'd love to discuss the details with you further. I work with local businesses like yours to create straightforward, easy-to-use websites at a flat fee for local businesses. If you're interested in learning more, please reply or give me a quick call.
